series_metadata.series_title: Engagement Letter Arrangements for Local Government Services (LGS)
series_metadata.series_description: All engagement letters arrangements for the various assigned services provided by LGS. Engagements will define the specific service(s) consistent with the Compilations/GAAP Conversions and the Fiscal Distress series of records identifying the year ends/periods of those services. Materials will include letters of engagement (including amendments), client-executed, terminations and all related correspondence (including e-mails) both external and internal.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: while needed ; Electronic: from engagement letter period ending date
